title: thelypteris assamica
intro: Thelypteris assamica, also known as the Indian fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its large fronds with multiple pinnae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris assamica are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
